brief:
你正在为小红书美甲图文笔记生成封面图。
核心要求：指甲清晰、手部自然、构图可点击、适合收藏、适合小红书封面。
用户需求：做一篇夏日蓝色猫眼短甲种草笔记，适合黄皮，清透显白。
不要直接生成文字。
prompt:
Create a poster image for poster aimed at broad professional audience. Treat this as a design-led visual solving this brief: 你正在为小红书美甲图文笔记生成封面图。
核心要求：指甲清晰、手部自然、构图可点击、适合收藏、适合小红书封面。
用户需求：做一篇夏日蓝色猫眼短甲种草笔记，适合黄皮，清透显白。
不要直接生成文字。

【参考图DNA摘要】
整体气质：干净、柔和、轻透、韩系高级感
配色基因：低饱和冰蓝、乳白、淡粉透底
材质基因：磁吸猫眼、果冻透感、细闪
构图基因：单手近景、自然弯指、上方留白
背景基因：浅色针织、玻璃珠、水波纹高光
保留原则：继承气质和材质逻辑，不机械复制原图摆位. Communication goal: attract and persuade quickly in a campaign or recruitment context. Translate the brief into one strong hero concept rather than many equal-weight elements. Brand and context strategy: no explicit brand provided; commit to one coherent visual system instead of averaging styles. Visual system: base mode: editorial campaign key visual; direction bias: premium editorial, contemporary, polished, commercially strong; energy bias: energetic but disciplined, confident, professional; composition bias: clear hierarchy, dynamic but stable layout, deliberate focal contrast; palette bias: premium neutrals with one strong accent family. Hierarchy: one clear hero idea; one dominant hero visual or symbolic concept, never a collage of equal-weight objects; secondary elements must support the hero rather than compete with it; background should create rhythm, not narrative confusion. Composition: clear hierarchy, dynamic but stable layout, deliberate focal contrast. Safe zone: reserve a clean, obvious text-safe zone in the upper third or one side for headline and CTA copy. Lighting: crisp premium lighting with controlled contrast and energetic highlights. Color strategy: restricted premium palette with disciplined neutrals and one energetic accent family. Detail density: hero-detail emphasis with a restrained background; hero-rich detail with restrained background complexity. Style direction: base mode: editorial campaign key visual; direction bias: premium editorial, contemporary, polished, commercially strong; energy bias: energetic but disciplined, confident, professional; composition bias: clear hierarchy, dynamic but stable layout, deliberate focal contrast; palette bias: premium neutrals with one strong accent family. Mood: energetic but disciplined, confident, professional. Aspect ratio: 3:4. Important constraints: make the result feel campaign-ready rather than generic AI art; prioritize focal hierarchy and typography-safe composition. Avoid: avoid generic AI clutter; avoid random floating UI fragments or HUD overlays; avoid generic gradient fog with no composition logic; avoid cheap neon cyberpunk treatment unless explicitly requested; avoid noisy micro-detail that weakens the hierarchy; poster text rendered directly into the image unless explicitly requested; random marketing icons and decorative interface fragments. Emphasize strong hierarchy, intentional whitespace, disciplined background complexity, and polished professional finish.
